positive: A majestic, intricate celestial forest scene illustration. The central subject is a stylized, bioluminescent tree with roots intertwining with nebula clouds and floating constellations. Incorporate delicate, geometric flora and fauna (e.g., stylized moths, crystal butterflies). Use a strong, high-contrast silhouette style with highly detailed linework and pointillism accents. The color palette should be deep indigo, ethereal gold, turquoise, and midnight black. Composition must be central, symmetrical, and designed as a repeating, tileable pattern or clean focal point for apparel. Studio quality, highly detailed, intricate engraving style, clean vectors, symmetrical composition.
